_comment_about_this_file: Illustrative example srt config — NOT srt's bare default. srt's bare default (no settings file present) is { "allowedHosts": [] } which blocks ALL network egress. This file relaxes that to a sane coding-agent baseline and adds the omp-required ~/.omp write allow. Copy to ~/.srt-settings.json for use with scripts/run-sandboxed.sh. Edit to match what YOU actually need.
_verified_against: omp v16.1.21 + srt 1.0.0 in an OrbStack Ubuntu 24.04 / aarch64 container, 2026-06-26.
_omp_write_allow_required: Without ~/.omp in allowWrite, omp crashes at startup with SQLiteError: read-only database (agent.db) and EROFS: read-only file system (logs/omp.<date>.log). Use the whole ~/.omp dir, not just ~/.omp/agent — omp writes to both.
